effect.content: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

governance.preferred_form: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

rule_text: The doctor-discussion CTA must follow the approved pattern: "Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for."
intent: Standardize the approved doctor-discussion CTA language.
summary: Doctor-discussion CTA must say exactly: "Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.
